title: Rational Containment
summary: Ada runs disciplined non-mystical hypotheses first, trying to contain the event inside plausible cognitive or environmental frames.

narrative.newInfo: Ada's method prioritizes elimination/testing over immediate belief.
narrative.dripHook: Plausible explanations reduce panic but fail to close the contradiction cleanly.
narrative.payoffDelivered: Competence reward: reader trust in Ada's mind deepens under pressure.
narrative.notes: Keep explanation attempts crisp and falsifiable.

rewardTokens.description: Ada explicitly tests multiple non-extraordinary explanations.
She defers interpretation pending data review.
